hero.title: Discover High Protein Foods
hero.subtitle: Explore 60+ high protein foods with complete macros, micros, prices, and HD images. The ultimate free resource for protein-rich nutrition.
features.label: Why Choose HighProtein Labs
features.title: Everything You Need to Track Your Protein
features.macros.title: Complete Macros & Micros
features.macros.desc: Protein, calories, carbs, fat, and fiber per 100g for every food item. No guesswork.
features.price.title: Price Tracking
features.price.desc: Average prices included so you can find the best protein per price value for your budget.
features.sorting.title: Smart Sorting
features.sorting.desc: Sort by protein content, calories, protein per dollar, protein per calorie, and more.
features.filter.title: Filter & Search
features.filter.desc: Filter by different categories of food like, veg, non-veg, supplements and so on

footer.desc: Your free resource for discovering protein-rich foods. Data sourced from USDA FoodData Central (fdc.nal.usda.gov).
